reason: Chain-of-thought is a fundamental technique for improving LLM accuracy, especially in technical domains like Science and Mathematics. Unlocking this early will provide a consistent boost to performance across all levels.
Unlocking pe_plan provides a structured planning phase and a reflection step after answering, which significantly increases the reliability of my responses and helps manage HP better in the long run.
Unlocking Reflection will provide a second LLM call to review and correct my answer, significantly increasing my accuracy for high-level challenges and Double Down opportunities.
